name: python3-wordcloud
title: python3-wordcloud
summary: little word cloud generator in Python
description:
little word cloud generator in Python
Compared to other wordclouds, this algorithm has the advantage of
* filling all available space.
* being able to use arbitrary masks.
* having a stupid simple algorithm (with an efficient implementation)
that can be easily modified.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use wordcloud_cli because little word cloud generator in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use wordcloud_cli as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair wordcloud_cli with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wordcloud_cli --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
